transactions.desc: The Astros optioned Ullola to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Hamilton for assignment Friday.
Atlanta activated Young (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Friday.
Atlanta optioned Karinchak to Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Atlanta recalled Molina from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
The Athletics designated Krook for assignment Thursday.
The Athletics activated Suarez from the paternity leave list Thursday.
Harris opted out of his minor-league contract with the White Sox on Thursday, Robert Murray of FanSided.com reports.
Rangel was optioned to Triple-A Lehigh Valley after Thursday's 6-1 loss to the Pirates, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
The Padres reinstated Marquez (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Thursday.
The Royals designated Cerantola for assignment Thursday.
The Royals optioned Rave to Triple-A Omaha on Thursday.
The Royals selected Maile's contract from Triple-A Omaha on Thursday.
The Dodgers optioned Barnes to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday.
The Rangers signed Voth to a minor-league contract Thursday, Shawn McFarland of The Dallas Morning News reports.
The Dodgers recalled Gervase from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday.
The Rangers optioned Santos to Triple-A Round Rock on Thursday.
The Rangers selected Peoples' contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Thursday.
The Royals optioned Cuas to Triple-A Omaha on Thursday.
The Royals activated Kolek (personal) from the family medical emergency list Thursday.
The Yankees activated Bednar from the paternity leave list Thursday.
The Mets selected Yan's contract and then optioned him to Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
Atlanta recalled Jarvis from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
Atlanta designated Tellez for assignment Thursday.
The Washington Nationals traded INF Randal Diaz to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Baltimore Orioles traded RHP Kyle Nicolas to the Washington Nationals and optioned him to the minors.
The Giants recalled Koss from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday.
The Pirates optioned Bidois to Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Sanders from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Yankees optioned Cruz to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Wednesday.
